summary: W880 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while routing the W853 homology-free selected-cochain provider through the W879 comparison concrete-leaves stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because the W853 provider fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W880 moves the latest W879-based stable ExactAt boundary from one W735 exact-input branch to one W853 homology-free selected-cochain provider, but the W853 provider fields are still not instantiated.

The remaining W853 provider expands to eight fields: WPP boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity/compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, normalized fixed-target data, source triangulation data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for one W853 homology-free selected-cochain provider, including its eight expanded fields.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
